data.title: The WNET Group and JIB (Japan International Broadcasting) Partner to Launch NHK WORLD-JAPAN in the New York Designated Market Area (DMA)
data.description: Starting from today, residents in the New York DMA can tune in to NHK WORLD-JAPAN on WLIW's digital channel 21.3. This new addition provides access to a wide range of international programming. The availability on local cable providers, such as Optimum, ensures broader viewership reach in the region. This milestone enhances the viewing options for audiences, especially those interested in Japanese and global content.

data.title: Ripple Treasury Launches the First Treasury Management System (TMS) with Native Digital Asset Capabilities
data.description: In San Francisco, Ripple unveiled the debut of Digital Asset Accounts and Unified Treasury within Ripple Treasury. This marks the introduction of native digital asset features within a treasury management system. This move allows CFOs and treasury teams to oversee, possess, receive, and oversee both fiat and digital liquidity from bank and custody providers all within one platform. This integration aims to streamline operations by consolidating financial assets within a singular system.

data.title: PranaX Corporation Appoints Dr. Richard H. LeConey, MD as Chief Medical Officer
data.description: In Houston on April 1, 2026, PranaX Corporation, a biotechnology firm specializing in regenerative biologics, revealed the selection of Dr. Richard H. LeConey, MD, as the new Chief Medical Officer. Dr. LeConey's role will be crucial in shaping PranaX's strategic path forward.

data.title: Hunton Promotes 16 to Partner
data.description: In Washington, D.C., on April 1, 2026, Hunton Andrews Kurth LLP announces the start of its 125th anniversary with the promotion of 16 lawyers. The firm commends these individuals for their expertise and dedication to client service.

data.title: Bitfarms rebrands as Keel Infrastructure, moves to Delaware with 2.2GW AI data center focus, exits Bitcoin mining.
data.description: Bitfarms, a former Bitcoin mining company, has now rebranded as Keel Infrastructure. This rebrand comes after completing its move to the U.S. and shifting its focus to the AI data center business. Keel Infrastructure is set to operate at a capacity of 2.2 gigawatts.

data.title: Alignment Credit Provides Senior Secured Term Loan Commitment to GOAT Foods
data.description: In New York, Alignment Credit facilitated a senior secured credit facility for GOAT Foods, LLC, acting as the sole lead arranger and administrative agent. The purpose was to refinance existing debt and support growth initiatives. Founded in 2020, GOAT is a family-owned business located in West Palm Beach, FL, specializing in snacks, confectionery, and baked goods. The transaction provided the company with capital to expand its operations.

data.title: Zeus Expands Access to Catheter Components Through Chamfr Marketplace
data.description: Chamfr's online marketplace is expanding its offerings to include more than 100 Zeus liner and heat shrink components. This move aims to support engineers in speeding up the development of medical devices. The announcement came from Zeus, a renowned company specializing in advanced polymer solutions and catheter manufacturing. The development is set to benefit professionals in the field and is based in ORANGEBURG, S.C., with the launch scheduled for April 1, 2026.

data.title: Royal Yacht International Announces Strategic Relationship with Douglas Elliman to Power Global Yacht Sales and Charter Through Elliman Yachts
data.description: In Monaco, Royal Yacht International (RYI) has partnered with Douglas Elliman to create Elliman Yachts, marking Douglas Elliman's entry into the luxury yachting industry. This new venture will allow Douglas Elliman clients to engage in buying, selling, and chartering yachts globally. RYI will serve as the exclusive yachting execution partner, providing comprehensive services throughout the process. This partnership signifies a significant expansion for Douglas Elliman, offering their clientele access to the prestigious world of yachting.

data.title: Covia Announces Laura Riquelme as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: An Ohio-based company, Covia, specializing in mineral-based and material solutions for Industrial markets, recently named Laura Riquelme as their new Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, starting from April 6, 2026. Prior to joining Covia, Riquelme held the position of CFO at Zep Inc. starting in 2022. With more than twenty years of expertise in financial and strategic management within various sectors such as specialty chemicals and lighting, Riquelme's appointment signifies a significant addition to Covia's leadership team.

data.title: Sogeclair transfers liquidity contract to Portzamparc (BNP Paribas Group) - Announcement made without further details.
data.description: In the recent update, it has been reported that the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases worldwide has exceeded 10 million, with the death toll reaching over 500,000. The United States has been the hardest hit, with over 2.5 million cases and more than 125,000 deaths. This global pandemic has affected countries across the globe, leading to widespread lockdowns and economic turmoil. The World Health Organization continues to emphasize the importance of following guidelines to prevent the further spread of the virus, such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing. Efforts are being made to develop a vaccine, but until then, vigilance and caution are essential in combating this unprecedented crisis.

data.title: Code Blue indicate - Emerging Cyber Threat Landscape: Iran Expands Cyber Strategy with "Wiper-as-a-Service" Model
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel on April 1, 2026, Code Blue Ltd revealed findings suggesting a change in Iran's cyber tactics. The investigations point towards a transition from Ransomware-as-a-Service (RaaS) to Wiper-as-a-Service as their new method. This shift signifies a larger plan of dispersing state-sponsored cyberattacks.

data.title: Bitcoin purchases through STRC to resume, aiming to buy 1,111 BTC. Will this push price to $80K? Strategy by Michael Saylor.
data.description: This week, Michael Saylor's strategy successfully secured funds to acquire a minimum of 1,111 BTC. This move is anticipated to boost the chances of driving prices upwards in April.

data.title: Port of Subs® Kicks Off Spring and Summer with a Fresh New Sub, Catering Deals, and Rewards All Season Long
data.description: A popular sandwich shop in Denver, Your Neighborhood Sandwich Shop™, is offering fresh and customizable subs for spring and summer gatherings. Port of Subs®, known for its flavorful offerings, is introducing a special menu for the warmer season. The franchise is gearing up to provide convenient group meal options for customers. This news was released on April 1, 2026.
